## Runtime.Session.EditingSession.saveAsAlternatives() method

Saves by adding ingredients as alternatives to existing version. Requires that the collection is mutable and ingredients changed.

**Signature:**

```typescript
saveAsAlternatives(options: ISaveAlternativesOptions): Result<ISaveResult>;
```
